art_highlights: Global Art Market Report 2026: Total sales reached $59.6B in 2025, a 4% YoY increase, signaling modest recovery amidst recalibration.
The high-end segment (> $1M) drove growth; works over $10M saw a 30% surge, highlighting concentration of wealth in top tiers.
Art Fair Dominance: Fairs now account for 35% of dealer turnover, while online-only sales declined to $9.2B, the lowest since 2019.
US remains the market leader (44% share), with France showing strong growth (+9%) to become the leading EU market.
Upcoming: Art Basel Hong Kong (Mar 27-29) is the next major indicator of market sentiment.

market_summary.market_sentiment: Cautious optimism for 2026; 43% of dealers expect sales to improve, with focus shifting back to in-person/local transactions.
market_summary.key_drivers: Strong auction performance (+9%), resurgence of the high-end sector, and a shift away from digital-exclusive models toward in-person fairs.
market_summary.trend: Market correction in contemporary art sectors offset by gains in Modern and Old Masters; sustainability and AI integration emerging as key themes for 2026.
